candidate_summary: Spin glass aging and replica symmetry breaking (statistical physics) → glassy-dynamics framing of long-running LLM agent deployment-aging effects
reasoning: Mechanical rule: 13 hits, 5 forced. Spin-glass-NN connection is one of the MOST established statistical-physics-to-ML analogies: Replica Symmetry Breaking in NN (1803.06442), Neural Networks as Spin Models (2408.06421), Loss Landscapes through Spin Glass Theory (2407.20724), Spin Glass Problem from DL Perspective (PMC9141424), From Spin Glasses to Learning (Springer 1134), Spin-glass models of neural networks. Software aging in LLM (2510.24188) and Mode Collapse / metastable region confinement (2605.00435) cover the LLM-aging side. Verdict FAIL: extremely well-established prior-art area; spin-glass-aging-for-LLM-deployment-aging is at most a sub-application within an occupied umbrella.
